keyInsight: 22-point gap between expressive sentiment and behavioral signals. Leading indicator: 6-8 week window for intervention.

database.text: Trust sentiment divergence detected: stated satisfaction 78%, behavioral repeat rate 56%. 22-point gap widening.
Booking abandonment rate spike: 34% → 41% in 14 days. Correlates with new pricing display format.
Barcelona STR regulation: Phase-out timeline accelerated. 12,000 licenses affected. Occupancy shift expected Q3.
Gen Z sentiment shift: 'authentic stays' keyword frequency up 340% in brand narratives. Moving from price to meaning.
Booking.com loyalty tier adoption: Premium members up 23% QoQ. Dependable driver strengthening.
Climate-conscious travel segment: 63% YoY growth. Sustainability now material for brand health scores.
Airbnb host satisfaction declining: Communication quality complaints up 18%. Personal driver at risk.
Mobile app session duration down 12%. UX friction in search-to-book flow. User Friendly driver impact.
Southeast Asian travel market surges 47% YoY. Digital nomad infrastructure expanding. New competitive frontier.
ANOMALY: Positive sentiment spike in 25-34 cohort. Contradicts overall trend. Investigating driver.
Google Travel AI trip planning launch: OTA disintermediation risk. Direct booking channel threat level elevated.
Restorative travel macro-shift: Wellness-adjacent stays now 28% of premium bookings. Category strength confirmed.
Vrbo family segment loyalty eroding: Competing on price, losing on Personal driver. Stayworthy opportunity window.
Customer support response time degraded: Avg 4.2h → 6.8h over 30 days. Dependable driver correlation: r=0.82.
TikTok #1 travel inspiration source for under-30. Cultural signal shift: visual-first discovery disrupting traditional funnel.
